summary: Iteration 38: P1/P2 Features Testing - Scheduled AI Monitoring, Partner P&L Report, Mobile Tab Bar Customization. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.

minor.issue: Shows SAR NaN for expenses when no sales exist - minor display issue

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/partner-pl-report returns report data (status 200)
Backend: Partner P&L includes company_summary with total_revenue, net_profit
Backend: Partner P&L supports date range filtering (start_date, end_date)
Backend: Partner P&L includes partners breakdown array
Backend: Partner P&L includes expense_by_category breakdown
Backend: Partner P&L includes payment_breakdown (cash, bank, online, credit)
Backend: GET /api/cctv/monitoring/config returns monitoring configuration
Backend: POST /api/cctv/monitoring/config saves configuration successfully
Backend: Monitoring config supports email notification channel
Backend: POST /api/cctv/monitoring/run returns disabled message when disabled
Backend: POST /api/cctv/monitoring/run queues task when enabled
Backend: GET /api/cctv/monitoring/logs returns logs array
Backend: GET /api/cctv/settings returns people_counting_enabled, motion_alerts_enabled
Backend: GET /api/cctv/alerts returns alerts array
Backend: GET /api/partners returns partners list
Frontend: Partner P&L Report page loads at /partner-pl-report
Frontend: Partner P&L shows company summary cards (Revenue, Expenses, Net Profit, Partners)
Frontend: Partner P&L shows date range filters (Quick Range, Start Date, End Date)
Frontend: Partner P&L shows tabs (Partner Breakdown, Expense Categories, Payment Modes)
Frontend: Settings CCTV tab loads with Scheduled AI Monitoring section
Frontend: Scheduled Monitoring has enable toggle [data-testid=monitoring-enabled]
Frontend: Scheduled Monitoring has interval dropdown [data-testid=monitoring-interval]
Frontend: Scheduled Monitoring shows feature selection (People Counting, Motion Detection, Object Detection)
Frontend: Scheduled Monitoring shows notification channels (In-App, WhatsApp, Email)
Frontend: Scheduled Monitoring has Save Monitoring Config button
Frontend: Scheduled Monitoring has Run Now button
Frontend: Mobile bottom nav shows 5 items + More button
Frontend: Mobile nav customize modal opens with 12 options
Frontend: Nav customize modal has Reset to Default button
Frontend: Sidebar Reports group shows Partner P&L link
critical_code_review_comments: Partner P&L Report (partners.py): Comprehensive P&L calculation including total_revenue, cost_of_goods, gross_profit, operating_expenses, supplier_payments, net_profit
Partner P&L Report: Partner breakdown shows ownership percentage, revenue/expense/profit shares, investments, withdrawals, current balance
Scheduled AI Monitoring (cctv.py): Config stored in cctv_monitoring_config collection with enabled, interval_minutes, cameras, features, notification_channels
Scheduled AI Monitoring: execute_scheduled_monitoring processes camera frames with AI for people counting, motion detection, object detection
Scheduled AI Monitoring: send_motion_notification sends to in_app (notifications collection), whatsapp (Twilio), email (SMTP)
Mobile Nav Customization (DashboardLayout.jsx): Uses localStorage 'ssc_bottom_nav' to persist user's nav choices
Mobile Nav Customization: Modal shows 12 options, allows selecting up to 5, has Reset to Default
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 tested 3 features: 1) Partner P&L Report - page at /partner-pl-report with company summary cards, date filters, tabs for partner breakdown/expense categories/payment modes. API at GET /api/partner-pl-report. 2) Scheduled AI Monitoring - in Settings > CCTV tab. Enable toggle, interval (1/5/15/30 min), features (people_counting/motion_detection/object_detection), notification channels (in_app/whatsapp/email). APIs: GET/POST /api/cctv/monitoring/config, POST /api/cctv/monitoring/run. 3) Mobile Tab Bar Customization - bottom nav shows 5 items + More button. Modal allows selecting up to 5 from 12 options (Home, Sales, Expenses, Stock, Reports, Customers, Employees, Branches, Analytics, CCTV, Credits, Settings). Saved to localStorage. WhatsApp/Email notifications depend on configured Twilio/SMTP settings - notifications queued but won't send without config.
